structured_payload_candidate.title: Zone Absolute Minimum Outdoor Air Reset Priorities (Title 24)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: Zone-Abs-OA-min reset: zero if window open; zero if unpopulated and occupied-standby allowed; Varea-min if CO2 sensor; else Zone-Des-OA-min.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Assign value based on listed priority.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: 1. Zone-Abs-OA-min shall be reset based on the following conditions in order from highest to lowest priority: i. Zero if the zone has a window switch and the window is open. ii. Zero if the zone has an occupancy sensor and is unpopulated and is permitted to be in occupied-standby mode per Section 3.1.1.2.b.3. iii. Varea-min if the zone has a CO2 sensor. iv. Zone-Des-OA-min otherwise.

structured_payload_candidate.title: CO2 DCV Reset for Parallel Fan-Powered Terminals (Title 24)
structured_payload_candidate.summary: VCO2-max determined as Vcool-max in cooling, Vcool-max minus parallel fan airflow in heating/deadband; CO2 loop resets Vmin* from Vmin to VCO2-max up to 50% output, beyond 50% to system.
structured_payload_candidate.trigger_condition: Zone has CO2 sensor, Occupied Mode, parallel fan-powered terminal.
structured_payload_candidate.required_behavior: Compute VCO2-max, reset Vmin* to 50% output range.
structured_payload_candidate.evidence_quote: (a) Determine VCO2-max as follows: (1) When the Zone State is cooling, VCO2-max is equal to the maximum cooling airflow setpoint Vcool-max. (2) When the Zone State is heating or deadband, VCO2-max is equal to Vcool-max minus the parallel fan airflow ... (b) The CO2 control loop output shall reset the occupied minimum airflow setpoint Vmin* from the zone minimum airflow setpoint Vmin at 0% up to maximum cooling airflow setpoint VCO2-max at 50%, as shown in Figure 5.2.1.4-2. The loop output from 50% to 100% will be used at the system level to reset outdoor air minimum; see AHU controls.
